name: Thai Fried Noodles (Pad Thai)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or frying pan, heat the oil.
2. Add garlic and fry until golden brown.
3. Add ready-fried beancurd and stir.
4. Break the egg into the wok and cook for a moment.
5. Stir in the cooked noodles.
6. Add turnip, spring onions, and half of the peanuts and beansprouts.
7. Stir well; add chili powder, sugar, light soy sauce, and lemon juice.
8. Turn off the heat and serve on a plate.
9. Sprinkle with remaining peanuts and chopped coriander leaf.
10. Arrange any remaining beansprouts and lime wedge on the side of the plate.
